chapter_title.en: Chapter 92 – The perfume for the one in Ihraam

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/312)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/312)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْمُحْرِمِ يَغْسِلُ يَدَهُ بِالْأُشْنَانِ قَالَ كَانَ أَبِي يَغْسِلُ يَدَهُ بِالْحُرُضِ الْأَبْيَضِ .

en.hubeali: Saffron, from Abu Al Magra who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the one in Ihraam washing his hand with the potash. Heasws said: ‘Myasws fatherasws used to wash hisasws hand with the white potash’.
en.sarwar: 13. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is not harmful, in the state of Ihram to smell, ‘Idhkhir (a green plant with a certain fragrance), lavender cotton, tulip, wormwood and similar things.’”
